creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

This patch doesn't apply and is it time to deprecate this in favour of audio/fdk-aac and audio/exhale since it hasn't been touched since 2011 by upstream?

Patching file /usr/ports/audio/libaacplus/Makefile using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
Hunk #2 failed at 15.
Hunk #3 succeeded at 37 (offset 1 line).

Best regards,
Daniel
